coding_summary: P026 represents a financially privileged student whose work experience has fundamentally altered her relationship with delivery. Unlike typical students, she uses delivery as her primary meal provision (ordering most meals) rather than an occasional treat. Her financial security from previous dental nursing work removes typical cost barriers, allowing £25 solo orders without concern. She's developed sophisticated multi-platform strategies, particularly favoring Gopuff for groceries due to unique products and 24/7 availability. Despite aspirational attempts to 'cut down' on ordering, her actual behavior shows complete normalization of delivery as basic meal provision. Her subscription psychology is driven by visible savings displays and peer influence rather than genuine cost concerns.
